title: Galatta Kalyanam

title: Music Xpress
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular songs produced by renowned artists is played to enthral the audience.

title: Perumal Subrapatham
subTitle: A curated compilation of sacred hymns and religious songs in devotion and praise of the Lord Perumal is played back to back.

title: Kandha Sasti
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of hymns and Hindu devotional song praising Lord Muruga played back-to-back seeking his blessings.

title: Polimer News
subTitle: The host presents the latest updates and developments pertaining to various pressing issues and current affairs across Chennai.

title: Comedy Express
subTitle: A line-up of talented comedians performs a series of cleverly crafted short skits with their sharp humour and quick-witted exchanges.

title: Pazhaya Tape
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best and popular evergreen retro songs from Tamil movies is played back to back.
